Interface IXMLTypeMapper2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that convert to and from XML to native types.

[Guid("39FDB45D-2B8E-4E07-A24C-55D722BC4BAC")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXMLTypeMapper2 : IXMLTypeMapper
